headline: Campbell’s Earnings Are Coming. Investors Want Signs Its Snack Business Is Stabilizing.
summary: Campbell’s reports fiscal third-quarter earnings on Monday as investors look for evidence that weakness in its snacks business is easing after a difficult first half.
